_note: Generated source-of-truth for dashboard-web's SUCCESS_METRICS.id list and WATCH_METRIC_IDS map. Decoupled from `@minsky/dashboard-web` package imports so that distribution/shortcuts/test/shortcuts-json.test.mjs no longer requires the dashboard-web TS package to be built. Drift gate at `dashboard-metric-ids-sync.test.mjs` asserts every TS-side ID also appears here. Path A decouple-before-delete step toward dashboard-web's eventual deletion (operator-gated on dashboard replacement landing).
